# Challenge Instructions

- Stay tightly aligned to the challenge brief
- Implement the required matching behaviour only
- Begin with the two handout acceptance scenarios
- Do not invent extra features unless needed to satisfy the brief
- Keep the returned model aligned to the stated output requirements
- Capture any requirement gaps in the README assumptions section
- Build a solution that is easy for a reviewer to run and assess

The challenge requires:
- C#
- automated tests
- a console application with hard-coded input
- no extra input mechanisms such as CSV, JSON, text parsers, or REST endpoints
- answers to the technical questions in `answers.md`
